title: Senior Software Engineer - MakeMyTrip - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - MakeMyTrip - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? MakeMyTrip in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MakeMyTrip:
MakeMyTrip is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip!
